info.name: FinLearnX API Collection
info.description:
Complete REST API collection for FinLearnX – Personal Finance Learning & Trading Simulator.

**Base URL:** http://localhost:8081
**Auth:** JWT Bearer Token

**How to use:**
1. Run POST /api/auth/login to get JWT token
2. Copy token value from response data.token
3. Set collection variable jwt_token = <your_token>
4. All secured endpoints will use Bearer {{jwt_token}} automatically

item.name: 🔐 Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — Register, Login, Health Check. No JWT required.

request.description:
Register a new user account.

**DTO:** RegisterRequest
- name (NotBlank)
- email (Email, NotBlank)
- password (NotBlank, min 6 chars)

**Returns:** JWT token + user details

response.name: 400 Validation Error

exec: pm.test('Token present', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.token).to.be.a('string'); pm.collectionVariables.set('jwt_token', r.data.token); });

request.description:
Login and receive JWT token.

**DTO:** AuthRequest
- email (Email, NotBlank)
- password (NotBlank)

**Auto-saves** jwt_token to collection variable.
Public endpoint — verify API is running. No authentication required.

exec: pm.test('API running', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.success).to.be.true; });

item.name: 👤 Users
item.description: User profile management. All endpoints require JWT authentication.

request.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile including wallet balance and role.

exec: pm.test('Has profile data', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.have.property('email'); pm.expect(r.data).to.have.property('walletBalance'); });

request.description: Update authenticated user's display name.

exec: pm.test('Name updated', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.name).to.equal('Arjun Kumar Sharma'); });

request.description: Verify 401 is returned when no JWT token is provided.

item.name: 📈 Stocks
item.description: Stock market data endpoints. GET /public/* are open (no auth). All others require JWT.

request.description: Public endpoint. Returns all available stocks with live simulated prices. No authentication required.

exec: pm.test('Returns stocks array', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(r.data.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); });

request.description: Public endpoint. Get details for a specific stock by symbol (e.g. RELIANCE, TCS, AAPL).

Public endpoint. Returns simulated OHLCV price history for a stock.

**Path variable:** symbol (e.g. TCS, RELIANCE, AAPL)
**Query param:** days (1–365, default 30)

exec: pm.test('Returns history array', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(r.data.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); });

item.name: 💹 Trading
item.description: Stock trading simulation — Buy/Sell stocks, view portfolio & transactions. All require JWT.

request.description:
Buy shares of a stock. Deducts from wallet balance.

**DTO:** TradeRequest
- symbol (NotBlank)
- stockName (NotBlank)
- quantity (NotNull, min 1)
- price (NotNull, positive)
- type: BUY or SELL

exec: pm.test('Trade type BUY', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.type).to.equal('BUY'); });
pm.test('Trade type SELL', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.type).to.equal('SELL'); });

request.description: Returns all current holdings for the authenticated user.

exec: pm.test('Portfolio is array', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.be.an('array'); });

request.description: Returns all buy/sell transaction history for the authenticated user, newest first.

exec: pm.test('Balance is number', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.be.a('number'); });

item.name: 💳 Expenses
item.description: Budget tracker expense management. All endpoints require JWT.

request.description:
Add a new expense entry.

Valid categories: Food, Travel, Education, Shopping, Entertainment, Health, Utilities, Others

response.name: 400 Bad Request

exec: pm.test('Category correct', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.category).to.equal('Food'); pm.expect(r.data.amount).to.equal(2400); });
pm.test('Returns array', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.be.an('array'); });

request.description: Returns total spending per category as a map.

exec: pm.test('Returns category map', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.be.an('object'); });
pm.test('Total is number', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.be.a('number'); });

request.description: Delete an expense by ID. Only the owner can delete their own expenses.

item.name: 🧮 SIP Calculator
item.description: SIP investment calculation and history. All endpoints require JWT.

request.description:
Calculate SIP maturity value without saving.

**DTO:** SipRequest
- monthlyAmount (positive)
- annualRate (1–50)
- durationYears (1–40)

exec: pm.test('Future corpus > invested', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.futureCorpus).to.be.greaterThan(r.data.totalInvested); });

request.description: Calculate and persist the SIP result to the database.

exec: pm.test('History is array', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(r.data.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); });

item.name: 📚 Courses
item.description: Learning hub course progress tracking. All endpoints require JWT.

request.description: Returns a map of courseId → progress data for all courses.

exec: pm.test('Returns object map', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.be.an('object'); });

request.description: Save reading progress for a course. courseId is a path variable.

exec: pm.test('Progress saved correctly', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.progressPercent).to.equal(60); pm.expect(r.data.pagesRead).to.equal(9); });
pm.test('Course completed', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.completed).to.be.true; });
pm.test('Badge earned message', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.message).to.include('Badge'); });
pm.test('Returns array', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.be.an('array'); });

item.name: 🧠 Quiz
item.description: Quiz submission and results. All endpoints require JWT.

request.description:
Submit quiz result. score/totalQuestions determine pass/fail (>=60% to pass).

Valid courseIds: sip-basics, budget-basics, intro-stocks, personal-finance, saving-strategies, financial-discipline, investment-planning, portfolio-basics, intermediate-stocks, crypto-fundamentals, expense-management, financial-goals

response.name: 200 Passed

exec: pm.test('Quiz passed', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.passed).to.be.true; pm.expect(r.data.percentage).to.equal(80); });
pm.test('Quiz failed', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.passed).to.be.false; });
pm.test('Perfect score passed', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.percentage).to.equal(100); pm.expect(r.data.passed).to.be.true; });

request.description: Returns all quiz results for the authenticated user, newest first.

exec: pm.test('Returns results array', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.be.an('array').and.not.empty; });

request.description: Get the most recent quiz result for a specific course.

response.name: 200 Not Found

exec: pm.test('Has courseId', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); if (r.success) pm.expect(r.data.courseId).to.equal('sip-basics'); });

item.name: 👑 Premium
item.description: Individual premium course unlocking. Each course is unlocked separately for $100. All require JWT.

request.description: Returns list of course IDs the user has unlocked. Empty array if none unlocked.

exec: pm.test('Returns array', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.be.an('array'); });

request.description: Check if the user has access to a specific premium course.

response.name: 200 Locked

exec: pm.test('Has unlocked field', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.have.property('unlocked'); pm.expect(r.data).to.have.property('courseId'); });

request.description:
Unlock a single premium course. Only THIS course is unlocked — others remain locked.

Available courseIds:
- value-investing
- wealth-psychology
- growth-investing
- trading-psychology
- financial-freedom
- technical-analysis-pro

exec: pm.test('Only wealth-psychology unlocked', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.courseId).to.equal('wealth-psychology'); });

request.description: Verify that unlocking value-investing and wealth-psychology did NOT unlock trading-psychology (individual unlock validation).

exec: pm.test('trading-psychology still locked', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.unlocked).to.be.false; });

item.name: 🔔 Notifications
item.description: Real-time notification management. All endpoints require JWT.

request.description:
Returns all notifications for authenticated user, newest first.

Notification types: buy, sell, profit, loss, info, warning

response.name: 200 Success

exec: pm.test('Returns notifications array', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data).to.be.an('array'); });

response.name: 200 Success

exec: pm.test('All unread', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); r.data.forEach(n => pm.expect(n.read).to.be.false); });
pm.test('Count is number', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.unreadCount).to.be.a('number'); });

request.description: Mark a specific notification as read by its ID.

exec: pm.test('Unread count is 0', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.unreadCount).to.equal(0); });

request.description: Delete all notifications for the authenticated user.

item.name: 🔎 Search
item.description: Global search across courses and stocks. /public endpoint is open, /api/search requires JWT.

request.description: Public search endpoint. No JWT required. Returns matching courses and stocks.

exec: pm.test('SIP course found', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.courses.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); pm.expect(r.data.courses[0].id).to.include('sip'); });
pm.test('Reliance found in stocks', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.stocks.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); pm.expect(r.data.stocks[0].symbol).to.equal('RELIANCE'); });
pm.test('Premium course found', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.courses.some(c => c.type === 'premium')).to.be.true; });
pm.test('Zero results', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.total).to.equal(0); });
pm.test('Empty results for blank query', () => { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(r.data.total).to.equal(0); });
